text.title: SDLC + AI Domain Overview Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: What stage of the SDLC does the task touch?

conclusion.verdict: route into lang / lint / test cluster
route into tracker / task / mr / kb cluster
route into inc / sec / gov cluster
skip — task does not belong to sdlc-ai

example.trace: input matches `stage == build OR lang/lint/test` → conclusion ref=`route-by-signal`.
